query:
SELECT name, COUNT(*) as count, GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY id) as ids, GROUP_CONCAT(status ORDER BY id) as statuses
FROM products 
GROUP BY name 
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY count DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aN4XovBvgLTwiy.root --database jWmfVYBaikHBYpPLbpiijG --execute SELECT name, COUNT(*) as count, GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY id) as ids, GROUP_CONCAT(status ORDER BY id) as statuses
FROM products 
GROUP BY name 
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY count DESC;
